label: Ruinward Bondstore
description: Ruinward Bondstore serves as a licensed warehouse of Cindervale, erected against a surviving strip of ancient ashlar and reinforced with blackened brick buttresses and riveted iron strapping. Its interior is organized by numbered bays of heavy timber racks and chained pallet-stalls, with a central tally-aisle designed for inspection under civic seal. Wall niches hold fixed lamp brackets and lockboxes for bond-tags, while a painted ordinance band repeats quarantine and interdiction notices mandated at the city’s license-stones. A narrow counting alcove of barred lattice overlooks the floor, emphasizing controlled custody over open commerce.
